lighting.shadow_character: Dark, high-contrast, and sharp-edged shadows with a distinct shape

color.grading_style: Color Block style with high purity and separation

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of matte pan surface, jelly-like egg white, and smooth yolk texture

improvement_notes: For a more traditional commercial food photo, consider using soft light (e.g., a large softbox) to create a more appetizing texture. A neutral or analogous background color could help focus attention on the food. Adding props and using a shallower depth of field could introduce more story and emotion.
nano_banana_prompt: Pop art style food photography of [a perfectly fried sunny-side-up egg] in a [cyan blue frying pan], set against a vibrant solid [bright orange] background. The scene is illuminated by a single source of harsh, direct sunlight coming from the top-left, creating a long, sharp, and dark shadow to the bottom-right. The color palette is a high-contrast, complementary scheme with extremely high saturation. Minimalist composition, high-angle shot, deep depth of field with everything in sharp focus. Shot on Kodak Ektar 100 film, ultra-detailed, graphic design aesthetic, clean and bold.
